experiment: 8-tile K-dimension tiled BF16 GEMM via Peano (mac accumulate)
kernel: aie::mmul with mac() accumulate for K-dimension tiling
toolchain: IRON + Peano + aie_api — OPEN SOURCE, NO CHESS
conclusion: K-dimension tiling with mac() accumulate enables arbitrarily large matmuls on fixed tile grid. Error from BF16 accumulation is expected and well-understood.
